methods.name: validate_confidence
methods.signature: validate_confidence(self, cls: Any, v: float) -> float

ConfidenceCalculator.responsibility: Standardized confidence calculation for Ghostbusters components

methods.name: calculate_agent_confidence
methods.signature: calculate_agent_confidence(self, delusions: List[Dict[Tuple[str, Any]]], base_confidence: float) -> ConfidenceScore
methods.docstring:
Calculate confidence for expert agents based on delusions found.

        Args:
            delusions: List of delusions detected by the agent
            base_confidence: Base confidence when no issues found

        Returns:
            ConfidenceScore with calculated value and factors

methods.name: calculate_recovery_confidence
methods.signature: calculate_recovery_confidence(self, changes_made: List[str], base_confidence: float) -> ConfidenceScore
methods.docstring:
Calculate confidence for recovery engines based on successful changes.

        Args:
            changes_made: List of successful changes made
            base_confidence: Base confidence when no changes made

        Returns:
            ConfidenceScore with calculated value and factors

methods.name: calculate_validation_confidence
methods.signature: calculate_validation_confidence(self, issues: List[str], base_confidence: float) -> ConfidenceScore
methods.docstring:
Calculate confidence for validators based on validation issues.

        Args:
            issues: List of validation issues found
            base_confidence: Base confidence when no issues found

        Returns:
            ConfidenceScore with calculated value and factors

methods.name: calculate_workflow_confidence
methods.signature: calculate_workflow_confidence(self, steps_completed: int, total_steps: int, step_confidence_scores: List[float]) -> ConfidenceScore
methods.docstring:
Calculate confidence for workflow execution based on completed steps.

        Args:
            steps_completed: Number of steps successfully completed
            total_steps: Total number of steps in workflow
            step_confidence_scores: Confidence scores for individual steps

        Returns:
            ConfidenceScore with calculated value and factors

methods.name: normalize_confidence
methods.docstring:
Normalize confidence value to ensure it's between 0.0 and 1.0.

        Args:
            confidence: Raw confidence value

        Returns:
            Normalized confidence value between 0.0 and 1.0

methods.name: combine_confidence_scores
methods.signature: combine_confidence_scores(self, scores: List[ConfidenceScore], weights: List[float]) -> ConfidenceScore
methods.docstring:
Combine multiple confidence scores using weighted average.

        Args:
            scores: List of confidence scores to combine
            weights: Optional weights for each score (must sum to 1.0)

        Returns:
            Combined confidence score

module_docstring:
Confidence Scoring Utilities

Standardized confidence calculation and validation for Ghostbusters components.
This module eliminates duplication of confidence scoring logic across agents, recovery engines, and validators.
